title: Sanji Feeds a Starving Enemy
description: On pages 11–14, Sanji feeds Gin despite the danger, revealing that his compassion for the hungry matters more to him than restaurant rules or pirate labels.
scene: Gin arrives broken and starving, while the Baratie cooks judge him as an enemy; Sanji alone treats hunger as something that must be answered.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sorry for intruding... but could I have some water... and food...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If it's money you want, I've got plenty...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: pirate fleet admiral "DON KRIEG"

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: WHA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The heck?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That weak, worn-out looking guy is krieg?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He looks like he's starving.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: wonder what happened...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don KrieG!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: I'm begging you! Please give him some food and water!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please save my captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He'll die at this rate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! Perfect, just perfect!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: So this is what the infamous Outlaw Don KrieG looks like!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We have money this time! We're paying customers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! Contact the Marines immediately!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is the perfect chance for the government to arrest him!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't let him have a single morsel of food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right! Who knows what he'll do once he gets back on his feet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is retribution for all the crimes he's committed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's only right that he should die after all he's done!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If we give him food and he receivers, it's only obvious that he'll attack our restaurant!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I ain't giving him a single drop of water!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I won't do anything. If you give me food, I promise I'll quietly withdraw from here...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So please... Please help me...!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: D-Don KrieG! Please stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A great man like you shouldn't be lowering his head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's too shameful!...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm begging you...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I don't mind if it's leftovers or whatever! Please, just give me anything!

summary: This part reveals the core of Sanji’s morality: no matter who a person is, he cannot ignore someone starving in front of him.
